description_en: My very first photo in VRChat, where [[cyan]] taught me how to pick my favourite avatars.
description_zh: 这是我在 VRChat 里的第一张照片，[[cyan]] 教我如何挑选自己喜欢的皮肤。

description_en: [[eric]] picked his avatar.
description_zh: [[eric]] 挑好了他的皮肤。

description_en: [[mooncake]] is considering which avatar to pick.
description_zh: [[mooncake]] 正在考虑要选哪个皮肤。

description_en: I invited two of my best friends to play VRChat together. I brought them to pick their avatars. Then we visited Chinese Memes Museums, a well-known VRChat world in China.
description_zh: 我邀请了两个最好的朋友一起玩 VRChat。我先带他们去挑皮肤，然后我们去了中文梗博物馆，这是中国 VRChat 圈子里一个很有名的世界。

description_en: Me and [[eric]] met a group of Chinese and had fun together.
description_zh: 我和 [[eric]] 遇到了一群中国人，并一起玩得很开心。

description_en: Met an American in Learn Mandarin world and we talked about human's future.
description_zh: 在 学习中文普通话 世界里遇到了一位美国人，我们聊了关于人类未来的话题。

description_en: It's a poster of [[luse]]'s "brand"
description_zh: 这是 [[luse]] 自己“品牌“的一张海报

description_en: I met a guy who designs all his avatars and outfits by himself with his own "brand".
description_zh: 我遇到了一个自己设计所有皮肤和服装的人，而且他还有自己的“品牌”。

description_en: Tried a karaoke world in VRChat, and surprisingly got two friends who listen to me.
description_zh: 试了一个 VRChat 里的卡拉 OK 世界，没想到居然有两个新朋友愿意听我唱。

description_en: So cuuute! Also met Dan Heng, a character from the same game with my avatar.
description_zh: 太可爱了！还遇到了丹恒，和我的皮肤来自同一个游戏。

description_en: So cuuuuuute again!!
description_zh: 又一次，太可爱了！！

description_en: I met a 13-year-old Chinese boy who's surprisingly able to speak English fluently in this age.
description_zh: 我遇到了一个 13 岁的中国男孩，没想到他这个年纪英语就能说得这么流利。

description_en: Someone's handing out areca nut. But we're good boy and shouldn't accept.
description_zh: 有人在发槟榔。不过我们是好孩子，不应该收。

description_en: I saw those photo prints showing circuit board. And met a friend who's designing his 3rd version of full body tracking solutions. That's pro.
description_zh: 我看到那些照片打印出来的东西展示着电路板。还遇到了一位正在设计第三版全身追踪方案的朋友。太专业了。

description_en: That day is the first day of the Gaokao, the National College Entrance Examination, which is the most important exam for every student in mainland China. [[ziyou]], [[unknown_cn]] and I introduced this to some foreign friends. And we wrote "Good luck on the Gaokao!".
description_zh: 那天是高考第一天。[[ziyou]]、[[unknown_cn]] 和我向一些外国朋友介绍了高考。然后我们写下了“高考加油！”

description_en: A person with soldier avatar caught my eyes, and I walked to him to greet. I later learned that he was a 72-year-old British gentleman.
description_zh: 一个士兵皮肤的人吸引了我的注意，于是我走过去和他打招呼。后来我才知道，他是一位 72 岁的英国老人。

description_en: I met a polyglot from South Korea. He can speak many languages even Latin.
description_zh: 我遇到了一位来自韩国的多语言者。他会说很多语言，甚至包括拉丁语。

description_en: This must be the most impressive experience so far. A group of Chinese met some American people. And we talked about many topics from high school life to cultural and law differences. And in the end we even discussed a math question and physics question!?
description_zh: 这一定是目前为止最令人印象深刻的一次经历。一群中国人遇到了一些美国人，我们聊了很多话题，从高中生活到国家间的文化法律差异。最后我们甚至还讨论了一道数学题和一道物理题！？

description_en: Burgercats stack!
description_zh: 汉堡猫叠叠乐！

description_en: Great to see [[infj_cloud]] again, we talked about the future of programming and ourselves.
description_zh: 很高兴再次见到 [[infj_cloud]]，我们聊了关于编程，以及关于我们自己的未来。

description_en: I shared my personal experience about finding ways to study aboard, and I do appreciate that everyone was good listeners
description_zh: 我分享了自己寻找留学途径的个人经历，也真的很感谢大家都认真听我讲。

description_en: Got a new friend from Kazakstan who speaks English, local language Kazakh and Russian fluently. And even Chinese!
description_zh: 交到了一位来自哈萨克斯坦的新朋友，他能流利地说英语、当地语言哈萨克语和俄语，甚至还会中文！

description_en: I met two friendly American people. Then my friends, them, their friends and I gathered on the night beach. We talked about much things, shared own experiences in learning languages and more.
description_zh: 我遇到了两个很友好的美国人。然后我和我的朋友们，还有他们以及他们的朋友们，一起聚在夜晚的海滩上。我们聊了很多事情，分享了各自学习语言的经历等等。

description_en: We sit around the campfire on the night beach, such an amazing vibe.
description_zh: 我们围坐在夜晚海滩的篝火旁，那种感觉真是太美妙了。

description_en: [[disguiser]] is playing piano and singing for us, both in Chinese and English!
description_zh: [[disguiser]] 在为我们弹唱中文和英文歌！

description_en: [[disguiser]] is playing piano and singing for us, both in Chinese and English!
description_zh: [[disguiser]] 在为我们弹唱中文和英文歌！

description_en: American person in Learn Mandarin world! I met [[disguiser]] studying Chinese here. To my surprise, his Chinese, including pronunciations, is pretty awesome. And he can even sing many traditional Chinese songs like *The Moon Represents My Heart*. We had a lot of fun.
description_zh: 在学中文的世界里遇到了一位美国朋友 [[disguiser]]。令我惊讶的是，他的中文水平相当了得，发音也非常地道。他甚至还能唱许多传统的中文歌曲，比如《月亮代表我的心》，我们相处得非常愉快。

description_en: It's great to see [[aiko]] again! He invited me to {{the.black.cat}} and I met many new friends here!
description_zh: 很高兴再次见到[[aiko]]！他邀请我进入了{{the.black.cat}}世界，我在这里遇见了许多新朋友！

description_en: A new French friend [[rami]] is here, and he showed us he can say some trending Chinese memes on the internet.
description_zh:
这里有一个新的法国朋友 [[rami]]，他向我们展示了他会说的一些中文梗。
「康神开播了？」「我要验牌！」

description_en: Old friends and new friends around! I printed a QR code of this gallery website on the wall, and one of them suggested that we should take an ad picture of that.
description_zh: 这里既有老朋友，也有新朋友！我在墙上贴了这个画廊网站的二维码，其中一位朋友提议我们以此为背景拍一张广告风格的照片。

description_en: I met a couple from Canada and the UK who were trying to learn Chinese, and their Chinese was surprisingly good. Later I became their Chinese teacher teaching them slangs and more :)
description_zh: 我遇见了一对来自加拿大和英国的情侣，他们正在尝试学中文，并且他们的中文出乎意料地不错。然后我就成了他们的中文老师，教他们一些俚语等等 :)

description_en: So I'm gonna turn 17 tomorrow! I decided to hold a birthday party and was inviting my friends to join. I also got two new friends unexpectedly!
description_zh: 所以明天就要17岁了！我决定举办一个生日派对并且在邀请我的朋友们加入，还出乎意料地认识了两个新朋友！

description_en: My 17th birthday party in VRChat. Friends gathered around the cake, the room got loud and warm, and for a while the whole night felt like a little home floating in another world.
description_zh: 我的 17 岁 VRChat 生日会。朋友们围在蛋糕旁边，房间里热闹又温暖，那一晚有一小段时间像是在另一个世界里拥有了一个家。

description_en: A cake close-up, because a birthday party needs at least one photo where the dessert gets to be the main character.
description_zh: 蛋糕特写。毕竟生日会总要有一张照片，让甜点也当一次主角。

description_en: Another big group photo from the party, full of nameplates, avatars, and the kind of chaos that only feels possible when people are genuinely happy to be there.
description_zh: 生日会的另一张大合照，满屏的名字、头像和那种只有大家真的开心聚在一起时才会出现的混乱感。

description_en: [[eric]] is also turning 17 in four days, so we celebrated for him together. We took a picture.
description_zh: [[eric]] 在四天后也要 17 岁了，所以我们也为他一起庆祝。我们一起拍了照。

description_en: "Sir, you can't sleep here!"
description_zh: “先生，这里不让睡觉！“

description_en: [[infj_cloud]] and [[eric]] turned massive and they were fighting under the stars.
description_zh: [[infj_cloud]] 和 [[eric]] 把自己变得巨大，在星空下打架。

description_en: Everyone is now burgercat! We got the best burgercat ever!
description_zh: 现在每个人都是汉堡猫了！我们做了最好的汉堡猫叠叠乐！

description_en: So I met [[cutcyoud]], a good Chinese friend who shares lots of hobbies with me. And [[mawusu]] from South Korea who visited and lived in many country, that really opened my eyes. Also more friends learning English together here!
description_zh: 认识了 [[cutcyoud]]，一个和我有许多共同爱好的的中国朋友。还有来自韩国的 [[mawusu]]，他游历并居住过许多国家，这让我大开眼界。此外，这里还有更多一起学习英语的朋友！

description_en: It was so amazing to meet new friends from Korea and my country China. We talked about many topics for hours.
description_zh: 能遇见来自韩国和中国的好朋友真的太好了，我们一起聊了很多话题，聊了几个小时。

description_en: "Dude, where did [[mawusu]] go??"
description_zh: “不是哥们，[[mawusu]] 去哪了？？“

description_en: A picture of Cerydra and Castorice! Two characters from the same game.
description_zh:
一张刻律德菈和遐蝶的照片！来自同一个游戏的两个角色。
*遐蝶：「参见凯撒大人」*

description_en: I met [[guderian]] and [[yuki]], who are [[cutcyoud]]'s friends. And It was so great to know that [[cutcyoud]] and I shares the same favourite singer Billie Eilish!
description_zh: 我见到了 [[cutcyoud]] 的朋友 [[guderian]] 和 [[yuki]]。而且，得知我和 [[cutcyoud]] 喜欢的歌手都是 Billie Eilish，这真是太棒了！

description_en:
*NEVER GONNA GIVE YOU UP!*
It was so happy and interesting to sing with friends.
description_zh:
你被骗了！
和朋友一起唱歌真的很快乐。

description_en: A picture before I leave.
description_zh: 我离开前的一张照片。

description_en: Met a friend [[bigby]] from Saudi Arabia. He told us that he dreamed of visiting China someday, and I showed him some pictures I took in Shanghai City.
description_zh: 遇见了一个来自沙特阿拉伯的朋友 [[bigby]]。他告诉我们他梦想有天能去中国旅游，我给他展示了一些我在上海拍的图片。

description_en: A Indonesian guy was here. And I showed him that I can sing the national anthem of Singapore. The anthem is in Malay, which is really similar to Indonesian. He said that I'm talented in learning languages :) (thx)
description_zh: 有个印度尼西亚的朋友在这。我向他展示了我能唱新加坡国歌。这首国歌是马来语的，和印尼语非常相似。他说我学语言很有天赋 :)（谢谢）

description_en: [[tony]] turned into a "foldable" boy thanks to something wrong with his full body tracking system. And we had a great time to talk to other people.
description_zh: 由于全身追踪系统出了点故障，[[tony]] 变成了“折叠人”。我们也和其他人愉快地聊了许多。

description_en:
*NEVER GONNA GIVE YOU UP!* (again)
Recently I'm kinda addicted to sing with friends at midnights.
*Thank [[yuki]] for capturing the main photo.*
description_zh:
你被骗了！(再次)
最近迷上了和朋友一起在深夜开嗓唱歌。
*感谢 [[yuki]] 拍了主图。*

description_en: *I was enchanted to meet you..*

*BIG BROTHER IS WATCHING YOU..*
Avatar height: 0.2 metres (8 in)
description_zh:
*老大哥正在看着你*
*BIG BROTHER IS WATCHING YOU..*
角色高度: 0.2 米

description_en: Our shadows!
description_zh: 我们的影子！

description_en: *California gurls, we're unforgettable~*
description_zh: 加州女孩舞

description_en: Chilled with best friends ^_^
description_zh: 和最好的朋友们一起放松了一下 ^_^

description_en: A Japanese friend said that every Japanese knows how to draw Doraemon.
description_zh: 一个日本朋友说，每个日本人都会画哆啦A梦。

description_en: Natives took over our place and trying to teach us English words.
description_zh: 母语者占领了我们的地盘，尝试教我们一些英文单词。

description_en: We've been seeing a guy named [[waterchan]] in {{english.hub}} for so long. He doesn't speak English at all, and his language (Hmong) sounds like gibberish to us. But thanks to [[semasan]]'s translation, we're finally able to communicate with him.
My first time in {{chinese.bar}}, met many intresting and cute friends here!
description_zh: 我第一次来{{chinese.bar}}，遇到了许多有意思可爱的朋友！

description_en: I met a new friend [[chi]] in {{english.hub}} today! She's really intresting and we had fun together with many friends.
description_zh: 我今天在{{english.hub}}遇见了一个新朋友 [[chi]]！

description_en: New new friends here! [[feedpancake]] told me that he really love Chow Mein, a type of noodles in China.
description_zh: 新朋友！[[feedpancake]] 告诉我他非常喜欢中国的炒面。

description_en: Two Colombinas from Genshin! Gotta say kawaii.
description_zh: 两只原神里的哥伦比娅！确实得说很可爱。

description_en: Chilling and chatting with friends in {{life.in.snow}}.
description_zh: 和朋友们一起在 {{life.in.snow}} 放松闲聊。

description_en:
Got a new friend [[yuma]] here! I introduced [[waterchan]] to people around us as nobody could understand him but me at that time.
(I can't understand either honestly..)
description_zh:
一个新朋友 [[yuma]]！我向周围人介绍了 [[waterchan]]，因为当时除了我没人能听懂他说的话。
(其实我也听不懂)

description_en: It's illegal to carry a weapon here!!
description_zh: 在这里持枪是违法的！！

description_en: Met a friend who also plays Genshin and we talked about the upcoming stories of the game.
description_zh: 见到了一个同样玩原神的朋友，我们聊了一些这个游戏即将推出的剧情。

description_en: [[tea]] with his brand new outfit! I like it!
description_zh: [[tea]] 和他的全新穿搭！我很喜欢这个！

description_en: Gugugaga!!!
description_zh: 咕咕嘎嘎！！！

description_en: Old friends!!
description_zh: 老朋友们！

description_en: I had really a great time chatting with [[cutcyoud]] and [[yuki]] for hours, and later [[den1a]] joined us.
description_zh: 我和 [[cutcyoud]] 和 [[yuki]] 聊了天，真的特别开心，晚些时候 [[den1a]] 也来了。

description_en: Kinich, Miko and Mizuki (me) from Genshin! Cuuute!
description_zh: 来自原神的基尼奇、神子和梦见月瑞希(我)！可爱捏！

description_en:
New friend [[alba]] and I in [[ninkaze]]'s arms.
Avatar height: 0.2 metres (8 in)
description_zh:
新朋友 [[alba]] 和我在 [[ninkaze]] 的怀里.
角色高度: 0.2 米

description_en: Many new friends!
description_zh: 好多新朋友！

description_en: Teaching a random friend mathematics...
description_zh: 正在教一个朋友数学...

description_en: I met the Singaporean friend [[smoketees]] again!
description_zh: 我再次遇见了新加坡朋友 [[smoketees]]！

description_en: Just an ordinary S'pore policeman and an ordinary Indo boy...(SE Asia joke)
description_zh: 只是一个普通的新加坡警察和普通的印尼男孩...(东南亚笑话)

description_en: American friends [[moon_beam]], [[lee_priest]] and Indonesian friend [[natasu]]! I shared them many delicious foods in my city and we also discussed about many eating and cultral differences.
description_zh: 还有我的美国朋友 [[moon_beam]]、[[lee_priest]] 以及印尼朋友 [[natasu]]！我给他们分享了许多我城市的美食，我们也探讨了饮食习惯和文化方面的诸多差异。

description_en: I got exams tomorrow... But I'm still chilling with friends :)
description_zh: 我明天还要考试...但是我还是在和朋友们一起玩 :)

description_en: The freaking sweet SUMMER VACATION HAHAHAHAA! Also my first time joining VRChat with full-body tracking.
description_zh: 美妙的暑假哈哈哈！这也是我第一次用全身追踪玩 VRChat。

description_en: It's good to meet old friend [[luse]] again and he showed us his new outfits.
description_zh: 能遇见老朋友 [[luse]] 真好，他还向我们展示了他的新服装。

description_en: Old friend [[fenixg]] we met again!
description_zh: 老朋友 [[fenixg]] 我们又见面了！

description_en: Genshin's the goat!
description_zh: 原神牛福！

description_en: Fishing with all the people silently is such a good way to relax!
description_zh: 和所有人安静地一起钓鱼真是个放松的好办法！

description_en: Bruh like why we got a military in {{english.hub}}??
description_zh: 不是哥们，为什么{{english.hub}}里面会有一整个军队？？

description_en: There's literally nothing beats talking about random topics with friends for 6 hours straight.
description_zh: 和朋友连续瞎聊6个小时，真的没什么比这更爽的了。

description_en: [[waterchan]] doing meditation...?
description_zh: [[waterchan]] 这是在冥想...？

description_en: Sharing my stories in public feels like giving a speech. And it's so good that I got many people listen to me.
description_zh: 公开分享我的故事感觉就像在发表演讲。能有这么多人愿意倾听，真是一件很棒的事。

description_en: Why there are suddenly so many people??
description_zh: 为什么突然有了这么多人？？

description_en: Thank y'all for listening to and sharing own stories with each other!
description_zh: 感谢大家倾听并互相分享彼此的故事！

description_en: A friend from Russia asks me if I'm living in {{english.hub}} because she sees me every single day. Uh, fair enough, maybe yes..?
description_zh: 一个来自俄罗斯的朋友问我是不是住在{{english.hub}}。额，好吧，可能确实..？

description_en: Many Malaysian friends were here and listening to my stories of learning English!
description_zh: 这里有很多马来西亚朋友听我分享自己学英语的故事！

description_en: [[chi]] is building a tomato cage for [[neru]].
description_zh: [[chi]] 正在给 [[neru]] 造一个西红柿笼子。

description_en: We're literally teaching [[chi]] how to write Chinese characters and picking a Chinese name for her!
description_zh: 我们在教 [[chi]] 如何写中文字，还在帮她选她的中文名字！

description_en: Chill time!
description_zh: 放松时间！

description_en: I joined [[moon_beam]] in {{en.jp.language.exchange}} and met two amazing Japanese friends. We talked about J-pop, which is my favourite few years ago.
description_zh: 我加入了在{{en.jp.language.exchange}} 里的 [[moon_beam]]，结识了两位很棒的日本朋友。我们聊到了 J-pop，那曾是我几年前的最爱。

description_en: We got a foodpanda squad here!
description_zh: 这里有一支 foodpanda 外卖小队！
